description: Machine-readable catalog of portable Cursor agent skills. AI agents: parse this file to find a skill matching a user's task, then follow the installation instructions in README.md.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Perform a senior-engineer code review of a pull request. Checks that new code conforms to existing codebase patterns, introduces no bugs, is maximally efficient, and contains no dead or unused code.
triggers: user attaches a PR link or URL
skills.notes: 8-phase workflow: gather PR context, understand codebase patterns, file-by-file diff review, cross-cutting analysis, deliver report, verdict, confirm with user, apply verdict (approve/merge or request changes). Outputs a pr-{number}-review.md file.

skills.name: commit-agent-changes
skills.description: Identify the current agent's code changes, create a branch, group changes into logical commits, and open a PR. Use when the user says 'commit my changes', 'commit agent changes', 'create a PR from this session', 'push what you changed', or wants to turn the current agent's work into a pull request.
triggers: create a PR from this session
turn agent work into a pull request
skills.notes: 5-phase workflow: identify agent changes (introspect context + parse transcript + cross-reference git), detect branch state, branch out, group and commit with conventional commit messages, push and create PR. Handles multi-repo workspaces.

skills.name: redeploy-frontend
skills.description: Trigger a Vercel redeploy of the frontend by pushing a harmless comment change to dev. Use when the user says 'redeploy', 'redeploy frontend', 'trigger vercel deploy', or 'trigger redeploy'.
skills.notes: Project-specific to a Next.js frontend deployed on Vercel. Updates a '// redeploy: <timestamp>' comment in src/app/layout.tsx and pushes to the dev branch. Auto-fixes prettier formatting issues before pushing. You will likely need to adapt the file paths, branch name, and package manager to your project.
